expectations.text: Recommends extracting a standalone reusable AlertComponent
The proposed component uses input() signal for message
The component encapsulates the @if(message()) — callers don't need the @if
expectations.evidence: Template line 8: `@if (message()) {` — the guard is inside the component

expectations.text: No duplicate 'alert' CSS class (avoids [class]="'alert ' + type()" anti-pattern)
expectations.evidence: Line 9: `[class]="type()"` — uses only type(), no concatenation with 'alert '
